config.autocrop.title: AutoCrop Settings
config.autocrop.option.harvestMode.toolt:
DISABLED: mod is completely inactive.
MANUAL: replants only after you left-click a mature crop yourself.
HARVEST (Risky): automatically scans and breaks crops in a radius every few ticks.
config.autocrop.option.replantDelayTicks: How many ticks to wait after a crop is broken before sending the replant packet. Increase on high-latency servers to avoid ghost blocks. (0 = instant)
config.autocrop.option.auraCooldownTicks: How many ticks between each automatic harvest sweep in Harvest (Risky) mode.
config.autocrop.option.riskBatchSize.too: How many crops to break and queue per harvest sweep. Higher values are faster but more aggressive. Only active in Harvest (Risky) mode.
config.autocrop.option.autoRefillSeeds.t: When the required seed is not in your hotbar, automatically move a stack from your main inventory (slots 9-35) into a hotbar slot before replanting.
config.autocrop.option.rememberMissedRep: Only active in Harvest (Risky) mode. If a crop was broken but could not be replanted (no seeds), the position is remembered. Once you pick up seeds, the mod will automatically replant all remembered positions.
